title: JARVIS Checkpoint Bundle B — Strategy Factory Read-Only Observation Layer
head_note: The background crypto/factory process advanced HEAD from the Bundle A baseline 307d994 to 102202a (commits 3d46c14, 102202a touched only trading_research/agentic_factory test/diagnosis files). Bundle B was implemented on 102202a; baseline 307d994 remains in history. No factory file was modified by Bundle B.
scope: Ship ONLY the CRITICAL read-only observation layer (T1, T2, T3) plus the freshness guard (T6). Additive and read-only. No trading execution logic changed; no broker/paper/live control created; no Factory run triggered; no strategy optimization; no crypto/futures research execution; no trading-file mutation; no runtime snapshot committed.

T1_factory_status.behavior: Lists the 10 most-recently-modified factory reports with an extracted decision/verdict each; report_count over all dirs. Missing dir -> state=missing/NOT_FOUND; unreadable report -> that row shows UNKNOWN, never an invented decision.
T1_factory_status.decision_extraction: _jarvis_report_decision(): exact priority keys (decision, verdict, final_verdict, gate_decision, is_verdict, final_recommendation, trading_recommendation, recommendation), then suffix (_verdict/_decision) and numbered (^\d+_(verdict|decision|recommendation)$) fallback. No match -> UNKNOWN.

T2_survival_ledger.behavior: Surfaces status, strategy_count, top-5 most_survivable and top-5 weakest (strategy/survival_score/closed_trades/open_trades/lifespan_days/drawdown_behavior/last_seen_at). Missing -> NOT_FOUND; corrupt -> fail closed (error). Computes no new score.

T3_candidate_registry.behavior: Enumerates RESEARCH strategy candidates (explicitly distinct from the VIDEO asset registries). Each has a display-only observation_tier derived from survival_score (>=10 OBSERVED_SURVIVOR, >0 WEAK_CANDIDATE, ==0 NO_EDGE_YET, else UNKNOWN) and deployment_status=RESEARCH_ONLY. candidate_status=RESEARCH_CANDIDATE_ONLY; paper_ready/live_ready/broker_control all false.

T6_freshness_guard.boot_capture: _JARVIS_SERVER_BOOT_HEAD captured ONCE at import via _jarvis_run_git(['rev-parse','--short','HEAD']), fail-closed to None.
T6_freshness_guard.behavior: Compares the HEAD the live process booted on against current on-disk git HEAD. Equal -> fresh; differ -> stale (detail tells operator to restart per Step 49 protocol); either missing -> unknown (fail-safe, stale=false). Pure read-only comparison; restarts nothing.
T6_freshness_guard.rationale: uvicorn runs reload=False, so a running process keeps booting-commit code until a manual restart; this guard makes that staleness visible without a manual probe.

ui.section: Strategy Factory Readiness (read-only observation; no execution; no broker)
ui.readiness_banner: pFactoryReadiness — derived ONLY from the four panels already fetched; shows READY when factory_status/survival_ledger/candidate_registry are available and the live build is fresh, else INCOMPLETE with a Pending list. Always shows 'Execution path: NONE — OBSERVATION ONLY'. Warns prominently when the live build is STALE.
ui.controls_added: none — no <button>, <form>, onclick, method=post, snapshot, or refresh affordance introduced (verified by template tests).

tests.new_file: tests/test_jarvis_factory_panels.py (15 tests: status wiring/28-key, no-trading-enable, freshness fresh/stale/unknown + boot-head shape, decision priority/numbered/suffix/unknown/non-dict, factory/survival/candidate read-only shape, template panels-present/no-controls)
tests.snapshot_whitelist: No change needed — status_key_count is dynamic (len(keys)) and already whitelisted in snapshot compare; it will correctly report the verified 24->28 difference against an older baseline.
tests.result: 408 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped (test_jarvis_route, test_jarvis_conversation_safety, test_jarvis_ask_contract, test_jarvis_snapshot_report, test_jarvis_factory_panels)

read_only_no_trading_guarantees: All four helpers read committed/local files only and run at most one read-only `git rev-parse`.
No helper executes a backtest, fetches data, calls a broker, starts/stops a bot, optimizes a strategy, reads secrets, or writes any file.
candidate_registry pins paper_ready/live_ready/broker_control = false and deployment_status = RESEARCH_ONLY for every candidate.
No /api/jarvis/snapshot and no /api/jarvis/refresh route added; template has no execution/refresh/snapshot control.
Missing/corrupt data fails closed to UNKNOWN / NOT_FOUND — never an invented decision or score.
The freshness guard restarts nothing; it only reports a comparison.
explicitly_not_done: Did not open Strategy Factory v1.
Did not modify trading execution logic or any trading_research/agentic_factory file.
Did not create any broker/paper/live/execution/refresh/snapshot control or endpoint.
Did not run, simulate, or optimize any strategy; ran no backtest, no crypto/futures research execution.
Did not stage or commit any runtime snapshot (storage/jarvis/snapshots) or the untracked backlog.
Did not perform any broad process kill or restart the live server.

validation.report_json_valid: to be confirmed via python -m json.tool
validation.git_status: only Bundle B files staged: app.py, templates/jarvis.html, tests/test_jarvis_snapshot_report.py, tests/test_jarvis_ask_contract.py, tests/test_jarvis_factory_panels.py, docs/jarvis_checkpoint_bundle_b/*

verdict_rationale: The three CRITICAL observation panels that Bundle A flagged as unbuilt (T1 Factory status, T2 pass/fail-survival ledger, T3 candidate registry) plus the T6 live-server freshness guard are implemented additive and read-only, wired into a 28-key fail-closed status feed, surfaced in a dedicated 'Strategy Factory Readiness' UI section with a clear READY/INCOMPLETE banner, and covered by 15 new tests (408 total passing). JARVIS now shows Factory readiness, candidate/pass-fail/freshness information from committed reports only, with missing data shown as UNKNOWN/NOT_FOUND and a prominent stale-build warning — while adding NO trigger or execution path. Strategy Factory v1 was NOT opened, per scope.
